vocab.ex_en: Do you want to exercise today?

vocab.expy: Xiǎng, kěshì wǒ yǒu diǎnr lèi.
vocab.ex_en: I do, but I'm a bit tired.

vocab.expy: Wǒ zuótiān wǎnshang shuì de hěn wǎn.
vocab.ex_uz: Men kecha kechqurun juda kech uxladim.
vocab.ex_ru: Я вчера лёг спать очень поздно.
vocab.ex_en: I went to sleep very late last night.

vocab.ex: 那我们今天不跑步，我们走路好吗？
vocab.expy: Nà wǒmen jīntiān bù pǎobù, wǒmen zǒulù hǎo ma?
vocab.ex_ru: Тогда давай сегодня не бегать, а пройдёмся пешком?
vocab.ex_en: Then let's not run today, let's walk instead, okay?

vocab.expy: Nǐ měi gè xīngqī yùndòng jǐ cì?
vocab.ex_uz: Haftada necha marta sport bilan shug'ullanasan?
vocab.ex_ru: Сколько раз в неделю ты занимаешься спортом?
vocab.ex_en: How many times a week do you exercise?

vocab.expy: Nǐ měi gè xīngqī yùndòng jǐ cì?
vocab.ex_uz: Haftada necha marta sport bilan shug'ullanasan?
vocab.ex_ru: Сколько раз в неделю ты занимаешься спортом?
vocab.ex_en: How many times a week do you exercise?
We'll start at seven in the evening.

vocab.expy: Wǒ dài shuǐ, nǐ yě dài shuǐ.
vocab.ex_uz: Men suv olaman, sen ham suv ol.
vocab.ex_ru: Я возьму воду, ты тоже возьми воду.
vocab.ex_en: I'll bring water, you bring water too.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jīn tiān xiǎng yùn dòng ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you want to exercise today?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Xiǎng, kě shì wǒ yǒu diǎnr lèi.
sentences.text_translation_en: I do, but I'm a bit tired.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuó tiān wǎn shàng shuì de hěn wǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Men kecha kechqurun juda kech uxladim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я вчера лёг спать очень поздно.
sentences.text_translation_en: I went to sleep very late last night.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那我们今天不跑步，我们走路好吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ men jīn tiān bù pǎo bù, wǒ men zǒu lù hǎo ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда давай сегодня не бегать, а пройдёмся пешком, хорошо?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then let's not run today, let's walk instead, okay?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo. Zǒu lù bú tài lèi.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měi gè xīng qī yùn dòng jǐ cì?
sentences.text_translation: Haftada necha marta sport bilan shug'ullanasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько раз в неделю ты занимаешься спортом?
sentences.text_translation_en: How many times a week do you exercise?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yí cì. Wǒ yùn dòng tài shǎo le.
sentences.text_translation: Bir marta. Men juda kam shug'ullanaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Один раз. Я слишком мало занимаюсь.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 以后我们每个星期运动三次，怎么样？
sentences.pinyin: Yǐ hòu wǒ men měi gè xīng qī yùn dòng sān cì, zěn me yàng?
sentences.text_translation: Bundan keyin haftada uch marta shug'ullanamiz, qalay?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Давай впредь заниматься три раза в неделю, как тебе?
sentences.text_translation_en: From now on let's exercise three times a week, how about that?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 可以。星期一、星期三和星期五吗？
sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ. Xīng qī yī, xīng qī sān hé xīng qī wǔ ma?
sentences.text_translation: Mayli. Dushanba, chorshanba va juma kunlarimi?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Duì. Wǎn shàng qī diǎn kāi shǐ.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right. We'll start at seven in the evening.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo. Wǒ dài shuǐ, nǐ yě dài shuǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Mayli. Men suv olaman, sen ham suv ol.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо. Я возьму воду, ты тоже возьми воду.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. I'll bring water, you bring water too.
sentences.speaker: B
